PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case #288549 (The Huie 1992 Family Trust).

Appearances: David King for Jane Huie and Arthur Huie. John Lofton for George Huie (Petitioner/Respondent).

Mr. King stated that the entire matter had not settled, that there was an issue with regards to the parties paying there share of the capital gains tax due on the North Point property and that he was prepared to go forward. Mr. Lofton stated that he would like to have further discussions. The parties informed the Court that the matter would take 7 days for trial. The Court signed the order referring the matters to Department 206 to be set for trial.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Continued To Apr-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 288549 (The Huie 1992 Family Trust).

Appearances: David King for the Estate of Lisa Huie, Arthur Huie and Jane Huie. John Lofton for George Huie (Petitioner). Avid Alavi for Bertha Joung (Trustee).

Mr. King reported that they were close to reaching a settlement and requested time to continue with mediation. The matter was continued to April 23, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Obi.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David King for Arthur Huie, Jane Juie and the estate of Lisa Huie. David Tillotson for George Huie.

Mr. King stated they are close to completing mediation, there is no pending forclosure on the real property, and requested a 60 day continuance. Mr. Tillotson reported that discovery is 85% completed. The matter was continued to January 23, 2008.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin. Bailiff: T. Bonner. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Continued To Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David King appearing for respondents, Arther, Jane and Lisa Huie. John Lofton appearing for George Huie. Lawrence Siracusa appearing for and with petitioner and proposed special administrator Bertha Joung. Mr. King is not objecting to appointment of Ms. Joung with limited powers. He is objecting to admit the Will. Hearing on the Trust matter is set on 8/15. Mr. Siracusa requested to have the Special Letters expired until further order of court. Discovery is almost completed on the first petition. Litigation issue discussed. Court signed the Order appointing special administrator with limited powers and N/B. Letters will expire until further order of court. Matter is continued to 11/13 for status on litigation. Hearing on 8/15 in the Trust matter is also continued to 11/13.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Anderson.
